examples: I understood the momentousness of the sentiment - I want you to audition for that role, he was telling me; it was, more than anything, a declaration of love - yet it made me nervous.
While you theatergoing butterflies out there keep nattering on about the Tonys — who will win, who should win, and so on — I have been focused on an issue of far greater momentousness and urgency.
My younger brother James, fully appreciating the momentousness of the occasion, came straight from a root canal to join us.
Even in flashback, the momentousness of the early days comes through.
